review_text: Unfortunately the van park has been impacted by the recent floods, so the laundry facilities weren't in operation. This did make our 5 day stay quite difficult at this time to manage our stay. When the Park gets all their repairs done, I believe that the park will be a comfortable stay.

Il y a eu un changement de propriétaire donc les anciens commentaires ne sont plus valables !
Le couple qui est dirige à présent sont juste adorable, tellement souriant, gentil et plein de bons conseils 🙏🏻
Les tarifs est 28 $ par nuit sans l’électricité pour deux personnes et une tente de toit
Tout est propre, les sanitaires sont propres, les lieux sont bien entretenus, il y a eu une inondation récemment donc ils sont encore en train de réparer les machines à laver le linge mais sinon à part ça tout est absolument parfait et vous guideront vers une laverie automatique en ville

Si vous restez à la Bundaberg, je vous conseille de venir ici vous serez accueillis chaleureusement

Merci ☺️
Very reasonable price and very nice staff
Awesome stay 😎 management couple very nice friendly couple, park very beautifully presented, will definitely c9me back and stay there again 😀 😊

The confirmation email had a photo of a cabin and I assumed I had booked a cabin. The photo was of reception. Please put a photo on the confirmation email of the caravans resembling truck trailers instead.  Accommodation is a king caravan divided in half creating small compact rooms. The shower curtain sticks to you whilst showering.

Handy location
Amenities need regular cleaning
Long grass & bindis everywhere
Clean and tidy, nice spot by the River.
Comfortable clean and fully equipped cabins.

Jason and Karina keep probably the most tidiest and best location of Bundaberg north!
There hospitality is welcoming and warm and have clean utilities we will be staying again for sure
Highly recommend

We stayed 4 nights between Christmas 2025 and new year, really enjoyed the park with its close proximity to the city and what we needed.
The park is old but extremely clean and well kept!
Super quiet, dog friendly, good amenities were clean and the showers were hot with good pressure!
Caravan spots were good with nice green grassy areas and shade!
Would definitely recommend this park!
Price was good , booking was easy, owners friendly and professional!

Omg this spot is Amazing. Only a couple minute drive to what ever you need... shopping centres, fuel, food, pubs and clubs, parks and fishing. Amazing shower, toilet, laundry facilities. All locked up for your safety. Amazing Amazing Amazing
We stayed in out apollo camper and had all the bits we needed. Power, water, tv antenna, toilet dump point.

Fantastic little park Corrina and Jason are the perfect hosts park is very clean and tidy at all times its a credit to them on all levels and dog friendly the view of the River at night with the lights of town reflecting on the water is so cool love this place and very reasonably priced

Nahe Stadtzentrum und trotzdem sehr ruhig. Grosszügige Abstellplätze. Waschmaschinen und Tumbler können mit Karte bezahlt werden, TOP!!! Campkitchen sehr neu. Uns hat dieser Campingplatz sehr gefallen!!

Stayed 2 nights in a unit. So quiet,couldn’t hear a thing and slept like a log.was awesome
Amenities in the unit were newish and the few things wrong I reported when leaving,just minor things. Couldn’t fault the unit or the staff. Lovely friendly people .
We had parking right outside the unit,a private verandah to enjoy the birspds and lizards and geckos. Will book every time we travel up to bundy or driving through for a stay over if we can
Close to shops, thanks guys
Cabin is clean. Location is close to the town. Good for stop over a night stay
Underrated! Highly recommend!

Needed to stay close to town for an appointment.  Well this caravan park was so handy, just cross the bridge and you are in town.  It's not a very big park.  Very tidy and clean.  It is right on the river, however no view due to mangroves.  There were midgies late in the afternoon.  Reception staff was very friendly.  A nice place to stay, especially if you want to be handy to town.
Neat, clean and tidy cabin.
Nice 👍

We stayed in a caravan at the park.The park requires a  bit of upgrading if it wants to appeal to the travelling grey nomads but if you're looking for a budget stay it is fine. The amenities were clean and tidy. The internal roads/lanes were dirt and a little pot holey but this helps keep the vehicle speeds down but can also be a bit dusty. We had a pleasant stay and it was close to Bundy central. The UTurn at the intersection once over the bridge travelling from South is a bit of a concern but not the fault of the park. All together it was a nice place.
Great place to stay

A very aggressive and dangerous Rottweiler dog attacked a little poodle in the park and the managers were friends with the owner of the dangerous dog and did nothing and did not ask them to remove the vicious dog. They lied to the council ranger and said other patrons said the poodle was to blame . Not a single other patron said the poodle was at fault and many were distressed with what happened and with the foul and abusive language they came  from the Rottweiler owners. The owner of the  dog was more aggressive than the dog . The manager failed terribly in their duty of care to all patrons in refusing to insist the dangerous dog be removed. Would never stay there again .

I’m not sure why this place has such a low rating, it’s a great campsite! Hot, powerful, and most importantly, CLEAN showers. Id choose a powerful and clean shower in an old fashioned bathroom over a dirty modern shower with a drip pressure any day. Nice camp kitchen with a fire pit outside and a tv. Even had utensils that you could use. Staff were around and all seemed friendly. Nice and quiet by the river. Perfect stop in Bundaberg and really good value for money
Had a good and affordable stay at an unpowered site. Good rates, dog friendly. The receptionist was very friendly
I really enjoyed my stay.  The (cabin) accommodation was comfortable and clean.  The location is close to the city centre.  I hope to be back when I visit Bundaberg again.

Ich war dort für 2 Monate, weil ich einen Job in der Nähe hatte. Als solo traveller habe ich mich nie so sicher gefühlt. Ich schlief in einem kaputten Van, bei dem ich meine Türen nicht verschließen konnte und ich habe mich trotzdem sicher gefühlt. Jederzeit!
Die Mitarbeiter waren super freundlich,  zuvorkommend und immer herzlich.
Für den Kühlschrank brauch man einen extra Schlüssel, da er nachts verschlossen ist. Das ist gut, weil meine Lebensmittel in Vergangenheit oft geklaut worden. Mit einem Code kommt man in den Waschraum und in die Toiletten zu jeder Zeit.
Danke für mit einer der schönsten Zeiten, die ich in Australien hatte. Wenn man sich etwas einsam fühlt oder einfach Lust auf Gemeinschaft hat findet jeden Freitag Abend ab 17 Uhr ein Feuer statt. Super nette Leute und tolle Gespräche!
My son stayed here in one of their on-site vans and he was very impressed with the room. The park laundry is very modern and accepts EFTPOS cards, so no looking for coins or change.
Cool vibe in the park, sites aren't cramped, facilities are clean 👌
Vans where a little small and needed a floor mat to stop tracking in water when it rains

We slept on a Hill due to its an unpowered site
Went to so many camp sites first time sleeping on a hill and everything is locked, the fridge and the laundry is always locked and if you want to use it you need to pay deposit but we didn’t know and we arrived outside office hours that means we can’t use all the services without knowing it before we book, the attitude is very bad, I understand the owner is angry that we charge our fan for five minutes due to we booked an unpowered site, but she threatened us and she said she can’t return our fan unless we give her ten dollars, what is this? A scam? We said sorry that we used your power for five minutes but she still didn’t return our fan back, in my culture we call it 侵佔
Apparently you don’t have this in Australia.
Comfortable bed

Location is very good, 10-15 min walk from central Bundaberg. We were grateful for the late checkin option and that the caravan was clean, comfy, and affordable. No bag storage was available for the day that we checked out, so it’s not a good option for other backpackers who leave from Bundaberg in the evening, but for anyone else wanting a nice caravan stay, it’s good! Thank you!
The static caravan rooms are so lovely,  comfy beds,  hot showers and everything you need provided. Staff are super friendly and on site laundry is only $4.

I've stayed at many caravan parks and this one here is my top pick, just amazing!
The view that you get from being just across from the center of Bundaberg.
For those who love a stroll the North Bridge is just around to the left.. beautiful to walk across and into town.
Riverdale has great toilet and shower facilities and a fully equipped camp kitchen for you to do some cooking, watching some TV and enjoy the facilities on offer.
For those who need to empty their vans toilet there is an awesome waste dump called " Dump Eazy " great water pressure too. The laundry facilities are great ( eftpos) and only $4 per load..huge machines & fast dryers! The best in Bundaberg in my opinion!
You feel safe here, it's open with cement slabs for vans & campers. Loads of room.
Sensor lights at night.
The price is also the best, close to town( walking distance).
The reception also has milk and basic supplies and necessaries like ice cream lol.
The Rooms they have there are amazing too, so cozy for a very affordable price.
Im sharing this because I want people to have real honest reviews on an awesome place to stay if you need one, I say, come on home, to Riverdale,  where it t just feels so cozy :) 18/4/2025
What we booked thinking it was a 'typical' caravan cabin was actually a lovely renovated unit on site. Everything provided. Wonderful.

Good for a short stay if you need to be right in town. Clean and tidy.
Reasonable budget stay.

Firstly I will say this Park is old.
The location is good for closeness to town.
The grounds need a lot of work.
The price is expensive as far as value for money.
The amenities were clean but dated.
Make your own judgement by my photos and videos.

Fantastic location, handy to everything in town. Very nice and clean amenities. Quiet area.💜
Only downside - midgies! 😞

We spent three days in this caravan park. Very kind owners, they also advised us where to buy the tent to avoid rip-offs. Clean, well-kept and quiet property, great location. I recommend it to everyone, thank you very much.

We had a homely, relaxing stay in a Riverdale unit. Everything was there that we needed and more. It was clean and cool with large, open living. It was a shame we couldn't stay longer and enjoy the verandah more. Thank you again 💓
Located on the river bank, with clean camp kitchen, TV,laundry, clean amenities, can't complain, close to North side shopping,
Great place, great location for a nice stroll into town. Everything you need is available for the camper or travelling families.

Cheap. Nice staff. That's about the only good parts. Terrible place DONT BOOK 44. Wanted to stay here for 2 nights as I'm going to lady musgrave island and the department is 20 mins from here but about 5hrs into the trip I decided we were only gonna stay that night so we let the staff know and they said they wouldn't give me a refund. Free Wi-Fi though which was very good quality. But As soon as I got here I didn't like it the person next to me as their caravan leaves a horrid scent. Looks amazing in the photos but in real life oh boy. I was quite thrilled with the river but when I came here I found out it was brown and unswimable unlike the photos. Nice staff a guy came and actually helped us with our water which was very nice of him that's about it. If you're looking for something cheap it's alright but quality isn't good.

Booked a room for 2 nights and traveled from Brisbane only to be met with a unfortunate incident as our car broke down. I canceled our booking and was hoping to get a refund back since we never set foot on the property and hoping that our refund could help us get back to Brisbane but the property refused to so. Tried contacting the property via phone and email but no one responded. So we had to take a train back to Brisbane from gympie where our car broke down. Very pathetic and unprofessional from staff
Quiet nice little place good self contained dongers aircon tv everything near by thanks guys 👍👍👍

I was dirty  not well supplied no cats or dogs allowed but when we drove up red cat on verandah. |No teaspoon |No teatowel|No soap|Double bed|Tv kept  turning off every 15 mins| floor  filthy|If you have  parents and 2 kids don't  bring them  here. |No room.|Bad place
One of the best places we stayed at, friendly, helpful and the camp fire at night was so much fun

The cabins are extremely clean. Communication was very good. I let them know I would be arriving late and I received an email saying my key was in the lockbox with the code. Luckily I had a camera on my phone as the park is dark after 9pm.

Great idea and seemingly cheap BUT it is located right next to a factory that eliminates some toxic fumes like burning rubber. The keeper said that it happened sometimes but one time too many I'd say! I never want to smell factory fumes on my holidays!!! the keeper stated that they couldn't do anything about it and refused to refund the money. There are plenty of beautiful places in Bundaberg without the factory fumes. Not worth saving $10....
Stayed in one of the new onsite van rooms. Was not expecting to find a lovely new room with everything needed for a short stay. Great value compared to motels with plenty of room to park trailer etc.

This caravan park was quiet to stay in & central for our trip to Bundaberg. The 2 downsides were this is no trees around caravans & the caravan we stayed in was very small for 2 people. Maybe it would be advisable to let people booking know the caravans are split into separate rooms. They would be suitable only for a single person.
Great park comfy cabins

We stayed at this caravan park for over a month due to work and loved every moment of it. The park is located right by the river, making it super peaceful and quiet—ideal for unwinding after a long day. The kitchen facilities are fantastic, with everything you need, including an oven and even an air fryer! The bathrooms were always spotless, which we really appreciated. The managers are incredibly kind and helpful, making our stay even more enjoyable. We also spent one night in one of the caravans, and like the rest of the park, it was exceptionally clean and comfortable. Highly recommend this place!

The place is still new that's why clean, hopefully it keeps going clean like new, quiet place, only one problem..no soap it got disc washer ,kitchen towels then why no soap 🧼 no much cost including, as the room cost fair enough to have soap for shower. Actually..
The best caravan park in Bundy close to shops and very quiet

Over priced as can get a beautiful big room with modern decor pool n undercover car parking for only another $10. Room in a mobile van  very small no undercover parking or  pool etc. Shop around defentily worth it

We stayed one night on an unpowered site on top of the riverbank.
We had a late check-in by using a key box.
Amenities are clean and working.
I was impressed by the kitchen: not too big (when there are may people), but very well equipped. They provide community pots, cutlery, and dishes. A boiling water tab is also there.
Very good value for a good price! Thanks a lot!

Value for money, convenient walk to CBD, along & over the bridge.
Ammenities & roadways are in need of some maintenance.

Stayed for12 weeks found staff very helpful. Shower block a little Old but cleaned every day. Hard wire tv cable available wifi free but couldn't possibly charge you for it. Spacious sites and ample car spaces. Quiet and on the river. Overall very nice.
Powered $38 for two. Receptionist friendly, helpful. Showers hot. Sites generous and level. Hard wired TV access to each Sites. Easy access to city. Older facilities.

Thankyou so much Karina n Jason ,and all the workers!! The cabins are so immaculate! Big ups to the cleaners U girls are AWESOME!!! 💕💯👌🏾 ,
Jason takes so much pride on the grounds and is so helpful with everyone💯, and Karina is so welcoming💯! Thank U so much for having us ❤️👌🏾
Not the friendliest people.
Power sites, generous size.  Amenities dated  but clean.  Loved central location, just across Burnett River to CBD.  Staff friendly and helpful.  Happily recommend this caravan park.
Great place, pet friendly and close to shops

We chose this caravan park as it was close to town. The lady in the office was very friendly and helpful.  We had a powered site with a slab. The amenities were very old and needed a bit of love. However, they were clean. We had rain, of course, as we do every time we go away. Which made the gravel road a little bit of a challenge to navigate.

We were really lucky to get in here because Bundaberg seems to be nearly booked out. When I contacted this park and they said they had one spot left I just grabbed it. It is an older park so they are not really made for the larger vans and our spot was a bit hard to get into but we managed. The park is clean and the amenities while dated are well maintained. the service was very friendly and the prices good.
Für eine Nacht in Ordnung, mehr aber auch nicht. Platz für große Camper vorhanden und saubere aber alte Duschen und Toiletten.

Like this place initially . workers ,even housekeepers or stakeholders treat you like special guest or family. thank you for that . great location, great room service ,great car space but lousy management from a particular means manager spoil the soup.
lack of proper appropriate communication or signage for guests conveniences . bit let down with closer of kitchen facilities without notice .

This is just wonderful and the best old caravan park in Bundaberg.
Right beside the old sugar mill and a stones throw from the cbd.
Just relax a bit and get it that these old van parks once housed southern sugar mill workers coming up for the season and you are walking in their footsteps.
Old but clean. Close to town . Quiet .
Walkers next door spews out filth from their furnace that will ruin your car duco

Location Location Location !!!
Beautiful scene's of the Burnett

Last minute booking - was arranging accommodation while travelling and dropped out of service once or twice.  The lady on the phone was patient and polite.||We stayed in cabin 3 - wow!  It wasn't what I was expecting; pleasantly surprised.  Renovated cabin - beds comfortable, large bathroom (has a washer/dryer), bunks have a double base and single top & all mattresses comfortable, kitchen is quaint and has enough appliances to make cooking achievable while away.  The cabin was clean and is decorated nicely. ||We arrived late and after normal checkin time (thank copious amounts of road works), yet the team were more than happy to accommodate us and settle us in.||Really impressed with the customer service and facilities.   Will definitely be back.

After a long drive, this little cabin is amazing, the staff are so kind, helpful and friendly, the cabin is seriously 10/10 clean, comfy and safe.
Not too mention fantastic price !

Thanks guys 🙂

Stayed multiple nights for work. The Queen bed cabins are great. Met all my needs whilst there. Lady in the office was super friendly and helpful to us during our stay.
Would happily stay again if more work came in the region.
Clean and easy to check in, we only stayed 1 night but definitely would book again if we were passing through.

Three star is what I search for when I google price wise.
So the basics need to be good.
Eg the bed the fridge the fact that it has internal bathroom and a reasonable priced washing facilities.
This had all of those.
They have really bad showers no hot water and small toilets, ants everywhere really disgusting places never going back 😡

We stayed in the caravan units. Compact, but perfectly designed, well appointed, cool and quiet. Very well priced, nice quiet location on the river, close to town. The management are friendly, helpful and were very understanding and flexible about changes with our booking.

We had a camp-site which was large on the river. Handy for what we wanted to do in bunderberg. Toilets and showers were clean. The doors to the showers and toilets were coded and hard to open. If you needed any help you had to ring the office as it is not mannered.
All you need for an overnight stay or longer. Clean,tidy. Close to town and shops. The river is a stone's throw if you want to have a fish. Nice quiet stay.
Lindo lugar buenos servicios
Stayed for one night. Our cabin for 2 people was really clean and the bed really comfortable. For the price I paid I was not waiting for this quality ! Really good surprise for me.

7 day stay, powered site. With the exception of Friday, Saturday night, which is beyond the control of management due to the pub across the river, this is a very peaceful caravan park.  Right on the Burnett River with plenty of room to exercise my dogs. The management are excellent and keep this place immaculate. Professional, great communication and personable. Just decent people who do a great job as if it were their own home. I appreciate the coded security on the laundry and amenities without having to have a fob or key. Very nice camp kitchen although I didn't use it, great staff, lots of green grass and not a Bible full of rules and regs. It's common sense to behave with dignity and respect. Great permanents who don't make you feel as though you are intruding, just a heartbeat from a great Iga, petrol and liquor store and only a short 2 min drive from the heart of Bundaberg. Better than being right in Bundaberg. Very happy and will return again.
Not very impressive, not recommended.
Nice location next to a river. amazing people at reception, very helpful!
Came for 2 nights, stayed for 5. Great place to stay, handy to CBD, super clean facilities, great washing machines and lovely staff.  These Kiwi travelers will be back!

We just came back from 2 nights in a compact Queen room.  Yes it looks a bit tired on the outside but these tiny (yes “compact” is very accurate!) are impeccably clean and have everything you need.  Such a great idea being relocatable.  So if the Burnett River floods again, they can simply haul these relocatable homes out.  The only thing they were lacking was maybe some towel hooks, but this was no big deal. We used the car as everything seemed to be on the other side of the river, but certainly walkable.  But it was 36 degrees during our stay, so we drove.  There’s two units in each relocatable home and yes you can hear everything from your neighbours, but for the price it’s fine.  All in all, a very pleasant surprise, and we would definitely stay there again.  We really appreciated the early check in too.
We stayed two nights, great spot for basing yourself to explore the region. Clean, comfortable and affordable.
Nice park,excellent price,quiet and relaxing

G8ve this place a shot!
We spent about 4 nights in Bundaberg. Our holidays were up to a rough start due to the weather.
Managers on site were so lovely, caring and kind. Ultimately, the park could do with a bit of live, but as explained later on, the park got flooded quite a few times.
It might not look spank new, but it was comfortable, safe and clean. The camp kitchen is very well stocked and equipped.
Oh and the rates are more than fair!

We bought our caravan and stayed 6 nights. Lovely clean park with nice grassed spot to stay. Close to town and on the river if you want to throw a line in. Lovely staff. Showers have great pressure. Thanks

A friendly park with clean amenities. Admin were very helpful with park information including TV reception (we were offered a cable for better reception). A young lad offered assistance with parking and another local lady gave us the rundown with dogs in the area. Overall a good experience and great value for money.
Grateful to the Staff

First night we slept with a bed bug in our compact van. Showed cleaners & I thought management but no discount given!|The compact van needed more hooks for hand towel & tea towel & some glasses as all that was provided to drink from was 2 coffee mugs. Also an option of broom & mop for longer stays.|The bed apart from the bug was comfortable.|The shower & toilet area small but functional.|Bar fridge provided. Need to cook in the camp kitchen with only one electric stove but 2 BBQs.|NO POOL. |To eat you had to sit at the outside, unshaded table with 2 chairs or eat in the camp kitchen.|We thought $83pn was a good rate but our daughter got a 3 bedroom, full fridge, large lounge & a kitchen in a pet friendly unit at Bundaberg West which also had a pool for the same rate!

Park was clean, staff were friendly and helpful, spoke to staff about a concern and they checked it out quickly and gave us feedback promptly. Playground small but ideal for the kids to burn off some energy, nice location, awesome price.

Rooms are a good size for an overnight stay. It was new as even the kettle still had the sticker on it and the half van with good size toilet and shower was spotlessly clean and proved with new soft towels and toiletries. Aircon works very well, and tv is a good size. Parking was outside the door. Plenty of storage in the room. The inner spring bed is something to want to take home and come with great bed covers to snuggle into and even the pillows feel new. It's about at 10 to 15min walk to a good feed at a pub. The staff at reception made it easy to check in on arrival. The standard set at this place is high and many motels could learn from them. I was hesitant at booking into a caravan park but I was very surprised in a good way. Highly recommended and well done to the staff.
We really liked it here. Good amenities and apparently the bathrooms will be renovated soon as well. Camp kitchen was great and coin operated laundry.

A fantastic stop if you're checking out Qld, beautifully located on the Burnett river opposite the town centre a 15 minute walk to town.
A very personable family and safe well managed environment I have relaxed and really enjoyed my stay I have woken up to the most beautiful sunrises and eagles souring over the river, I guess they are what keeps the snakes away none here or mossies for that manner being a Kiwi. A big thankyou to Angela and her mother Tracey they look out for their guests, the management team Wayne and Karen first class nothing is to hard thanks guys of you want a a fair-dinkum break you will enjoy here, only one negative there's a White polar bear that lives here watch out of you have one or two too many you do feel his bite in the morning.
I highly recommend with out reservation
Brent Herbert
Great little park,,we spent a couple of nights here and loved it,,well equipped camp kitchen and friendly staff,,thank you

I was disappointed to say the least. We arrived, once at our site we could not put our awning out or mat down due to not being able to secure to ground, spoke to management and was told it was from the floods, they filled it with rubbish bricks large rocks etc, he said nothing he could do but bring some pavers to hold mat down as ground was covered in prickles, old razor blades and batteries etc, but no he did not return. When asked if I could move I was ignored

I can honestly say I've never experienced such rude hosts in all my travels. This was my first trip to Bundaberg, having lost my mum months earlier it was a special reunion with my son & because he mistakenly drove beyond the carpark to where my car was, we got spoken to & treated like criminals. Two obnoxious, self important woman came up and spoke to us like they had badges, "What's going on here" & "you've gone beyond the sign", let me add there's no boom gate or even paved drive/carpark. I kindly explained this is my son & he didn't realise & they continued to stand there like the 'law in this town' completely intruding on our moment & ruining the energy of my stay, I'm hugely upset at the lack of discernment. If you're looking for that vacation feel and the respect being a paying customer should bring you, my suggestion is go elsewhere.
I loved Bundy but this left a stain.

My partner and I have been travelling and ya know some van parks I just can't stay in but....... soon as we drove 🚗 into Riverdale I felt at home. 😊
The management are new since February and making huge changes to make the park even nicer in the coming future.
💫The environment is friendly and kind.
~Card operated laundry only $4 per wash/dry! 👌👍
Amenities are lovely and clean xx 👍 security code for your safe feelings too.
The location and view is the best! The price will blow your mind! 🙀
Only $35 per night for powered site! What more could we ask for..🤷🤷‍♀️
Thankyou Riverdale ❤️  we will definitely be back!!!

**** CaT & BarZ  ****
Ace place 👌
The cabin was well appointed, but pokey to get around in. Bed against the wall meant one partner climbing over the other to get up. Cosy accommodation in a nice park.
Great value for money with clean and tidy rooms. Angela the receptionist was lovely and very helpful, Thank you for a wonderful stay 😊

Had a single trailer room. Wasn't tiny, was perfect size. Clean shower and toilet in room. Comfortable enough bed. Microwave, toaster, kettle, cup, plate, knife & fork, towels, shampoo and body wash. Honestly can't complain, oh and a great price too!  Felt safe. Friendly staff.

Stayed here for 3 nights. Park needs a bit of a tidy, it’s a bit annoying when your site needs a clean when you arrive.  Few permanent residents, but all friendly. Very reasonably priced. Would stay again.

We stayed there the park was neat and tidy, the managers were lovely and looked after us. Our only complaint was the other caravaners slamming the toilet and laundry doors. They really didnt have any consideration at all. Not a lot the managers can do about it really.

Alles da was man braucht, einige Dauercamper. Einrichtungen alt aber sauber. Umgebung ist nicht gerade die beste Lage, man ist in 16 Minuten zu Fuß in der Innenstadt. Frischwasser für den Camper im nahegelegenen Park unter der Brücke.
Good for an overnight stop.  Room was compact but had everything we needed.  Shower was hot. Water pressure was good.
Good park, handy to attractions and shops
Love this
just all right, a place to stop and get some power and water. nothing much. maintenance just all right.
Angela was very helpful could not do enough for us will go again recommend
Great park. Good location and great managers.

雖然地點離熱鬧市區稍遠，
但步行20～30分過個橋就可以到Art Gallery、市區。

邦得堡的Backpacker 不多，同樣70澳幣在AAOK可以住單人房/晚，不用在背包客棧跟人家擠混合房，有社恐的人可以試試。

AAOK經理Karen人也很親切幫我續訂兩晚的單人房，非常謝謝她。
We stayed in the house on the property. Very nice stay.
Great and nice place. Clean and nice view

Under new ownership as of 5 months ago. I booked a powered site for  a single night. Lovely experience and friendly staff. Very clean ammenities including showers and communal kitchen.

We were given a lovely riverside plot for our tent with friendly neighbours. Only complaint would be that our powered site had a slope, but made little difference.
Would not recommend a “cabin” stay for a couple, certainly not in the colder months.

Friendly staff, friendly service. Angela was extremely helpful in securing us a site given we arrived ahead of our scheduled date.

This is an older style park that is well maintained by the staff. Amenities are dated but always clean. Dump point & small playground. Close proximity to Bundaberg CBD.
Angela was extremely friendly and helpful during my stay at the park for a family gathering.

Stayed two nights here and found it quiet and comfortable. The on site manager was very friendly and helpful. We had a powered site which was well priced at $35 per night, especially considering its central location. The current managers  have only been here four (?) months and have made a fantastic job of cleaning up the park. The shower block is quite old but clean and perfectly adequate. Nightly shuttle bus to and from the RSL is a bonus. We would stay here again.

Very good experience!
We arrived with a large group and they received us with no problem.
All the facilities are clean and full of everything that you need every day.
Recommended!
Quiet,friendly neighborly environment and helpful service
